metadata.description: CLI-based Claude Code skills wrapping popular tools

plugins.name: screenshot-web
plugins.description: Take web page screenshots by URL using shot-scraper (Playwright)

plugins.name: screenshot-desktop
plugins.description: Capture desktop, window, or screen region screenshots using native OS tools

plugins.name: markdown-web
plugins.description: Convert URLs, YouTube videos, and RSS feeds to Markdown using markitdown

plugins.name: markdown-file
plugins.description: Convert local files (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, etc.) to Markdown using markitdown
